title: Handle nulls and duplicates deliberately
description: Decide and enforce explicit policies for missing values and duplicate keys rather than letting them flow through unexamined.
body: Use when modeling or loading data with keys and nullable fields. Do not let nulls silently propagate into joins/aggregates (they drop rows or skew sums) or let duplicate keys inflate counts. Actions: assert uniqueness on primary/business keys, set explicit null policy per column (reject, default, or impute with documentation), and dedup deterministically when at-least-once delivery is possible. Validation signals include a uniqueness check passing and null rates within threshold per column. Risk boundary: unexamined nulls and dupes corrupt aggregates in ways that look plausible; treat a uniqueness failure on a key as blocking, not a warning.
